_comment: League-strength coefficients for cross-league player comparison. Derived from average club Elo (clubelo.com, snapshot 2026-07-01), normalised so the strongest league = 1.0. Used to DISCOUNT per-90 output when ranking players across leagues: a weaker league's counting stats are multiplied by its coefficient before the shared percentile pool is computed. Rates (pass%, save%, conversion, g-xG, goals prevented) are NOT scaled — the coefficient would corrupt the unit. Single-league views are unaffected. Tunable: steepen the spread if you think the quality gap is larger than Elo implies (Elo differences are mild between these Nordic leagues).

eloSource.method: mean club Elo, top division, normalised to strongest = 1.0
